'''Dalla Suul''' was a [[human]]<ref name="Tales from Vandor" /><ref name="Note" /> [[Gender|male]] [[Homeworld|native]] to the [[Core Worlds|Core World]] [[Corellia]], as well as a notorious [[Corellian]] [[pirate]]. Following [[Tobias Beckett]]'s [[Raid on Kessel|raid]] on the [[planet]] [[Kessel]], a [[Crimson Dawn]] enforcer claimed that the Corellian [[Han Solo]] was Suul's [[Solo family|grandson]]. He alleged that the young man had actually joined the [[Galactic Empire]] under his real name of "Han Suul," but [[Drawd Munbrin|the]] [[Imperial Recruitment Officer|intake officer]] was not listening carefully and wrote "Solo" instead of "Suul".<ref name="Tales from Vandor" />

Despite the rumor, Han had told the recruiter that he did not have a family. As a result, the [[officer]] listed the new [[Imperial cadet|recruit]] as "Han Solo".<ref name="Solo">''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Dalla Suul was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[2018]] replica journal book ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Tales from Vandor]]''.<ref name="Tales from Vandor" /> In [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]], the character's name was "[[Dalla Solo]]" and was originally created for [[Dave Wolverton]]'s [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''.<ref name="TCoPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>
